name: Unbridled: That Horse Game
short_description: Unbridled: That Horse Game is the ultimate horse simulator, giving you the freedom to follow your own dreams and create your own unique story. Experience the freedom of riding, the challenges of horse sports, and the joy of breeding horses - all in a stunning virtual world.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Unbridled: That Horse Game - a unique horse game simulator that gives you the freedom to make your own choices and shape your own destiny.

As an Early Access title, we value player feedback and are actively working to expand and improve the game with your support.

  • Horse Creator: Design your dream horse with an incredibly detailed creation system, allowing you to customize everything from coat patterns and colors to features like mane style and unique markings.

  • Horse Care: Groom, feed, and care for your horses through systems that are easy to learn and feel realistic.

  • Training at the Riding School: Improve your skills on dedicated training courses designed to prepare you and your horse for future challenges or competitions.

  • Archery on Horseback: Test your precision with dynamic horseback archery gameplay.

  • Gardening: Grow plants, crops, horse feed, or flowers as a source of income or crafting materials.

  • Obstacle Course Builder: Train your horses your way by designing custom courses that suit your style and goals and share them in multiplayer.

  • Jobs: Earn money and gather resources by chopping wood, lending a hand in the stables, and more.

  • Veilingen: Meet friendly NPCs and browse unique shops in the old town.

  • Buying and Selling Horses: Acquire new horses from various sources and sell them.

  • More Horse Breeds: Uncover rare and powerful horse breeds to strengthen and diversify your herd.

  • Online Multiplayer: Ride with other players through interactive sessions.

Coming Soon to Unbridled

Unbridled is in Early Access, which means exciting features are still in development:

  • Estate Designing: Customize the look and layout of your estate to make it truly your own.

  • Competitions: Compete in large-scale events, including disciplines such as Show Jumping!

  • Horse Breeding: Breed horses like never before in a horse game.

  • Wild Animals: Encounter and interact with various wildlife species as you explore the world.

  • Fishing: Enjoy the serene waters by fishing to catch a variety of species or other surprises.

  • Western Riding: Explore a dedicated mode focused entirely on Western riding and enjoy the authentic atmosphere of this unique style.

Embark on a one-of-a-kind adventure, live your equestrian dreams, and help shape the future of Unbridled. The journey begins now, what story will you create?
